_comment: Representative fixture: a measure group carrying hydration mass (type 77) but NO weight (type 1). BodyMeasurement requires weightKg > 0, so this whole group must be skipped rather than fabricating a placeholder weight (spec FOR-132 Edge Cases: 'Hydration mass but no weight in the group -> waterPercentage null', resolved conservatively in WithingsMeasuresAdapter's javadoc: no weight means no measurement at all).
